personalInfo.name: Eslam Ahmed
personalInfo.title: Civil Engineer | Structural Design Engineer
personalInfo.description: SCE Certified Civil Engineer with 5+ years of experience in structural design, site supervision, and technical office engineering.
personalInfo.about: A smart and energetic civil engineer with wide knowledge and experience in construction supervising, structural engineering, and technical office work. Passionate about delivering high-quality structural solutions and sharing knowledge through teaching engineering courses.

services.title: Structural Design
services.description: Designing structural systems for buildings including villas, high-rise buildings, hospitals, mosques, and industrial structures.

services.title: Site Supervision
services.description: Supervising construction activities, managing pipe racks, structures, and site excavation operations.

services.title: Technical Office Engineering
services.description: Preparing shop drawings, quantity take-offs, and detailed drawings for beams, columns, slabs, and footings.

services.title: Engineering Courses
services.description: Lecturing in structural design, reinforced concrete, AutoCAD, and shop drawing courses.

experience.title: Technical Office Engineer
responsibilities: Project: Bahtim Ring Expansion
Owner: General Authority for Roads and Bridges
Preparing shop drawings for beams, columns, slabs, and footings
Preparing quantity take-off for civil and arch works

experience.title: Site Engineer
responsibilities: Project: Midor Refinery Expansion
Company: Petrojet for Petroleum Projects
Construction: Technip FMC / Ennpi
Owner: Middle East Refinery Company
Supervising main pipe rack, structures, and compressors shelter
Controlling and supervising all site excavation activities

experience.title: Structural Design Engineer
responsibilities: Preparing structural design for all building elements
Creating suitable structural systems and converting architectural layouts to structural systems
Preparing reinforcement layouts for all structural elements
Projects designed: Villa, High-Rise Building, Elevated Tank, Factory (2-Hinged Frame System), Wedding Hall (Radial Frame System), Hospital (15 Repeated Floors), Mosque

experience.title: Lecturer — Civil & Architecture Courses
responsibilities: Lecturer for Structural Design Diploma (CSI Diploma)
Lecturer for Structural AutoCAD Course
Lecturer for Reinforced Concrete Design Manual Course

experience.title: Lecturer — Civil & Architecture Courses
responsibilities: Lecturer for Structural Design Diploma (CSI Pro Track)
Lecturer for Structural AutoCAD Course
Lecturer for Reinforced Concrete Design Manual Course
Lecturer for Shop Drawing Manual Course

projects.title: Midor Refinery Expansion
projects.description: Site engineering supervision for main pipe rack, structures, and compressors shelter. Construction by Technip FMC / Ennpi for Middle East Refinery Company.

projects.title: High-Rise Building
projects.description: Full structural design including system selection, reinforcement layouts, and element design for all floors.

projects.title: Hospital — 15 Repeated Floors
projects.description: Structural design for a hospital with 15 repeated floors including complete reinforcement layouts.

projects.title: Factory — 2-Hinged Frame System
projects.description: Industrial factory structural design using 2-hinged frame system with full structural analysis.

projects.title: Wedding Hall — Radial Frame System
projects.description: Structural design for wedding hall using radial frame system.

projects.title: Elevated Tank
projects.description: Structural design and analysis for an elevated water tank.

projects.title: Mosque Project
projects.description: Complete structural design for mosque including dome and minaret structural systems.

projects.title: Bahtim Ring Expansion
projects.description: Technical office engineering for road expansion project. Owner: General Authority for Roads and Bridges.

projects.title: Villa
projects.description: Full structural design for residential villa including all structural elements and reinforcement details.

certificates.title: Structural Design Diploma — CSI Pro Track
